title: BCI Safety Profile v1
description: Neurorights-aligned caps for BCI mappings. These limits are HARD and must be enforced in Rust geometry kernels: caps on CSI, DET, per-channel intensity, rate limits, and recovery windows. Lua must not implement safety logic.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for BCI safety profiles.

profileId.description: Human-readable profile ID (e.g., standard, corridor_med, safe_mode).

tier.description: Policy tier alignment. Lab profiles are experimental; standard/mature are allowed in production.

channelCaps.description: Per-channel caps for normalized intensity and rate of change. These are base caps before stress gates and safe-zone multipliers.

timingCaps.description: Global caps for CSI/DET and allowed DET drift over time.

maxCsi.description: Maximum allowed CSI for this profile. The kernel must clamp any output that would exceed this CSI.

maxDet.description: Maximum allowed DET (Dread Exposure Time) for this profile on the canonical 0–10 scale.

maxDetDriftPerMinute.description: Maximum allowed change in DET per minute. Used to prevent rapid escalation.

recoveryPolicy.description: Mandatory back-off behavior after startle spikes or overload. Implemented as a cooldown/safe-zone envelope in Rust.

startleRecoverySeconds.description: Minimum duration (seconds) the kernel must keep conservative caps after a startle spike.

safeZoneDurationSeconds.description: Duration (seconds) of enforced safe-zone caps after an overload or extreme stress event.

safeZoneCaps.description: Per-channel caps applied during safe zones. These override base channelCaps while recovery is active.

stressGates.description: Stress-band-dependent multipliers and overload thresholds. Gates are keyed to BciSummary stressBand and visualOverloadIndex.

stressBandCaps.description: Per-stress-band multipliers applied on top of base caps. Bands must match BciSummary.stressBand values.

overloadThreshold.description: Thresholds at which the kernel must enter safe-zone behavior based on visualOverloadIndex and stress band.

visualOverloadIndex.description: Visual overload threshold in [0,1] beyond which safe-zone behavior must be triggered.

extremeStressBand.description: Minimum stressBand value that, combined with overload, triggers safe-zone logic.

bciInfluenceCaps.description: Caps on how much BCI can influence outputs relative to non-BCI baselines.

maxBciContribution.description: Maximum fraction of any output that may be attributable to BCI-driven adjustments instead of baseline content.

meta.description: Optional metadata for documentation, search, and governance.

notes.description: Free-form notes about this safety profile.

labels.description: Tags or labels for search and grouping (e.g., corridor, tutorial, low-intensity).

maxIntensity.description: Hard cap on normalized intensity for this channel in normal operation.

maxDeltaPerSecond.description: Hard cap on normalized per-second change for this channel. Used to prevent sudden jumps.

maxIntensity.description: Maximum normalized intensity for this channel while in safe-zone/recovery.

intensityMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to base caps for this stress band or channel. 1.0 leaves caps unchanged; lower values tighten them.
